scopes.title: Global modules
scopes.description: Shared modules used across the whole static site, such as search, inquiry, navigation helpers, and customer-service entry points.

scopes.title: Home modules
scopes.description: Reusable homepage building blocks for brand introduction, advantages, cases, products, articles, FAQ, and inquiry conversion.

scopes.title: Detail modules
scopes.description: Enhancement modules for article and product detail pages, focused on SEO, conversion, breadcrumbs, and related links.

modules.title: Search entry
modules.description: Adds a static-site search entry that reads search.json without querying the database.

modules.title: Floating inquiry
modules.description: Shows a floating inquiry button with contact page, phone, email, WhatsApp, and WeChat shortcuts.

modules.title: About intro
modules.description: Presents company positioning, brand story, core capabilities, and business introduction.

modules.title: Advantages
modules.description: Displays service strengths, product selling points, technical capabilities, or delivery advantages as cards.

modules.title: Cases
modules.description: Displays customer cases, application scenarios, or solution outcomes.

modules.title: Products
modules.description: Aggregates published products for company websites and independent storefronts.

modules.title: Articles
modules.description: Aggregates industry articles and knowledge-base content for SEO growth.

modules.title: FAQ
modules.description: Displays frequently asked questions to reduce inquiry friction and enrich long-tail keywords.

modules.title: Inquiry form
modules.description: Collects visitor name, phone, email, and inquiry details on the homepage.

modules.title: Breadcrumbs
modules.description: Shows hierarchical paths on article and product detail pages for SEO and navigation.

modules.title: Related content
modules.description: Shows related articles or products on detail pages to improve internal linking and browsing depth.
